mapper.sql: id, client_id, project_name, start_date, end_date, total_income, status, created_at, updated_at
p.id, p.client_id, p.project_name, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.total_income, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, c.name as client_name, c.wechat_id as client_wechat
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM projects p LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY p.start_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(total_income) as total_income, AVG(total_income) as avg_income, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'in_progress' THEN 1 END) as in_progress_count FROM projects WHERE 1=1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects ( client_id, project_name, start_date, end_date, total_income, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{client_id}, #{project_name}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{total_income}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE projects
client_id = #{client_id},
title = #{title},
total_amount = #{total_amount},
commission = #{commission},
status = #{status},
created_date = #{created_date},
delivery_date = #{delivery_date},
delivery_date = NULL,
remarks = #{remarks},
WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE projects
project_name = #{project_name},
start_date = #{start_date},
end_date = #{end_date},
total_income = #{total_income},
status = #{status},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT YEAR(created_date) AS year FROM projects ORDER BY year DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.total_amount, p.commission, p.status, p.created_date, p.delivery_date, p.remarks, c.name AS clientName, c.wechat_id AS clientWechatId, e.id AS expenseId, e.item_name AS expenseItem, e.amount AS expenseAmount, f.id AS fileId, f.original_filename AS fileName FROM projects p JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id LEFT JOIN expenses e ON p.id = e.project_id LEFT JOIN project_files f ON p.id = f.project_id WHERE p.created_date >= #{start_date} AND p.created_date <= #{end_date} ORDER BY p.created_date DESC, p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.total_amount, p.commission, p.status, p.created_date, p.delivery_date, p.remarks, c.name AS clientName, c.wechat_id AS clientWechatId, e.id AS expenseId, e.item_name AS expenseItem, e.amount AS expenseAmount FROM projects p JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id LEFT JOIN expenses e ON p.id = e.project_id WHERE p.created_date >= #{start_date} AND p.created_date <= #{end_date} ORDER BY p.created_date DESC, p.id DESC
SELECT title FROM projects WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS project_count, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS total_amount, COALESCE(SUM(commission), 0) AS total_commission FROM projects WHERE created_date >= #{start_date} AND created_date <= #{end_date}
